title: COUNSELING SERVICES - 211info
text: FRIENDS OF THE FAMILY MINISTRIES CORVALLIS COUNSELING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a variety of professional and pastoral counseling services. Virtual and in-person sessions are available. 685 NW 5th Street Suite A Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm; appointment times vary Email (541) 757-1761 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 757-1761 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Sliding scale fees range from $30-$140, depending on gross monthly income. Some counselors accept Samaritan and IHN. DOCUMENTS: Intake documents will be made available before the first session AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located a few blocks north of downtown on 5th Street Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Child Guidance Conjoint Counseling Faith Based Counseling Individual Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - WORKSHOPS AND SEMINARS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FRIENDS OF THE FAMILY MINISTRIES CORVALLIS
